pi_items.source: task.json description field: 'Create a new SLD style in GeoServer named "river_buffer"'
task.json description field: 'The buffer distance must be 0.1 degrees'
task.json description field: 'Use a red fill (#FF0000)'
task.json description field: '0.5 opacity for the polygon symbolizer'
task.json description field: 'Assign this new style to the "ne:ne_rivers" layer'; verified in setup_geoserver.sh which publishes ne_rivers table as layer in ne workspace

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an SLD style named 'river_buffer' with a geometry buffer function that applies a 0.1-degree buffer distance to the Natural Earth rivers layer (ne:ne_rivers). The buffered geometry must use a red fill (#FF0000) with 0.5 opacity in a PolygonSymbolizer. Natural Earth is a real, public domain geospatial dataset containing rivers and lake centerlines vector data at 1:110m scale in WGS84 coordinate system (EPSG:4326). The dataset is sourced from https://www.naturalearthdata.com/ and is not synthetic data.
